text: {"matches":[{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 2 gives the specific protein and calorie content of an extra‑large egg, which is a concrete instance supporting the broader claim that eggs can be a nutritious food."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 3 lists specific vitamins and minerals in an extra‑large egg, providing a detailed example of the general statement that eggs are nutritious."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 1 specifies that egg color does not affect nutrition, a particular aspect within the broader claim that eggs are a nutritious food."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":0,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 0 addresses cultural significance of eggs, while claim 6 addresses their nutritional value;
